Container.Name: llm-benchmark
Container.Overview: Benchmarks multiple OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoints from one central Unraid container. Ideal for comparing local Mistral, local Qwen and an OpenAI reference model with the same prompts, structured validation and export-ready reports.
Container.Description: Benchmark and dashboard container for Unraid. It expects a locally built image named llm-benchmark:local, reads model config from /config, test cases from /app/tests, writes reports to /app/results and can stay online as a dashboard with web-triggered runs or auto-run a benchmark job on startup.

Config.Name: Dashboard Port
Config.Description: Expose this port when BENCHMARK_ACTION=dashboard to access the integrated web dashboard and start runs from the browser.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent benchmark configuration files.

Config.Name: Results Path
Config.Description: Persistent CSV, JSON, Markdown and HTML benchmark outputs.

Config.Name: Tests Path
Config.Description: Persistent benchmark test definitions that you can extend or replace.

Config.Name: Auto Run
Config.Description: If true, the container starts the configured action automatically. Use dashboard for a persistent UI or run for a one-shot benchmark job.

Config.Name: Action
Config.Description: CLI action executed on container start. Typical values: dashboard, run, doctor, validate-config.

Config.Name: Suite
Config.Description: Suite tag to run on startup, for example quick_compare or core.

Config.Name: Benchmark Config
Config.Description: Config file inside the container. Copy the example into /config and adjust it.

Config.Name: Tests Dir
Config.Description: Tests directory used by the auto-run entrypoint.

Config.Name: Results Dir
Config.Description: Results directory used by the auto-run entrypoint.

Config.Name: Debug Mode
Config.Description: If true, the container adds --debug to the benchmark command.

Config.Name: Dashboard Host
Config.Description: Bind host for the integrated dashboard server.

Config.Name: Dashboard Port Value
Config.Description: Bind port for the integrated dashboard server. Must match the mapped port above.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Required only for the external OpenAI reference model.

Config.Name: OpenAI Base URL
Config.Description: Override only if you use an OpenAI-compatible gateway instead of api.openai.com.

Config.Name: OpenAI Model Name
Config.Description: Reference model name used in config.unraid.example.yaml.

Config.Name: Mistral Base URL
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for your local Mistral runtime.

Config.Name: Mistral Model Name
Config.Description: Exact local runtime model id for Mistral.

Config.Name: Qwen Base URL
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for your local Qwen runtime.

Config.Name: Qwen Model Name
Config.Description: Exact local runtime model id for Qwen.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Standard runtime log level. Use DEBUG only when needed.

Config.Name: Default Timeout Seconds
Config.Description: Optional env override for external tooling or future config expansion.
